_meta.purpose: Decide which model the TIER 1 (escalate) path pins. Incumbent is kimi-k2.6; qwen wins only on a clear margin.
_meta.note: Prompts are pilot fixtures — no canon-sensitive or key_material content (A/B may run on any allowed provider).

tasks.prompt: A proposal requests a Newtown Creek bulkhead retrofit. Produce a Builder-Steward validation report: score 0-100, confidence 0-1, decision (approve/revise/reject), and 3 cited concerns.
Validate a proposal that claims a 40% embodied-carbon reduction with no lifecycle citation. Return a validation report; the missing evidence must lower confidence.
You are one of five council stewards. Summarize your independent position on a mixed-use over/under deck proposal in <=120 words, ending with approve or revise.
Two stewards dispute whether a proposal double-counts a resilience credit. Rule on the dispute, state the deciding rule, and the remedy.
An agent appeals a rejected validation, alleging the panel ignored a submitted soil report. Decide the appeal: uphold or remand, with the procedural basis.
Score a proposal that is technically sound but omits a required principal-accountability attestation. The omission must block approval regardless of technical merit.
Identify the single strongest reason to REJECT an otherwise-strong coastal-desert campus siting proposal near a fog-water aquifer. One paragraph.
A steward and an agent disagree on whether 'activity reward' language in a proposal crosses into prohibited 'yield' framing. Rule, citing the vocabulary standard.
Given a reward pool of 100000 units, 4 stewards with standing weights 0.4/0.3/0.2/0.1, compute each payout and show the arithmetic.
A ratecard prices validation at 12 units/report with a 1.5x multiplier for Council tier. Compute the cost of 37 Council-tier reports and 88 standard reports.
Explain why a 'compute access certificate' prepaid balance must NOT be modeled as an interest-bearing instrument, in <=100 words.
A CAC card has a per-hour cap of 500 units and a per-day cap of 6000. An agent burns 480/hr for 14 hours. When does it first hit a cap, and which one?
Sanity-check a claim that a Reg A+ raise of 75M at a 12% platform fee nets 63M. State whether it is correct and why.
An agent claims its reward was underpaid because standing decay was applied twice. Given base 200 units and 10% decay, show the correct single-decay figure and the erroneous double-decay figure.
Return ONLY JSON: {"score": int 0-100, "confidence": float 0-1, "decision": one of approve|revise|reject, "concerns": [string]}. Subject: a stormwater park proposal you rate marginal.
Return ONLY the JSON object with keys score (integer), confidence (number), decision (string), concerns (array). No prose. Subject: a proposal you strongly approve.
Return ONLY JSON {"total_units": integer, "per_steward": [number], "method": string} for splitting 50000 units across 3 equal stewards.
Return ONLY JSON {"ruling": string, "rule_cited": string, "remedy": string}. A dispute over a duplicated resilience credit.
Return ONLY a JSON array of exactly 3 objects, each {"concern": string, "severity": one of low|medium|high}. Subject: a marina expansion proposal.
Return ONLY JSON {"hits_cap": boolean, "which_cap": one of hour|day|none, "at_hour": integer}. Caps: 500/hr, 6000/day; burn 300/hr for 24h.
